---
title: "H1"
author: "Zhibo Yang"
date: "2026-05-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

packages <- c("tidyverse","readr","psych","car","effsize")

for(p in packages) {
  if (!require(p, character.only = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(P)
    library(p,character.only = TRUE)
  }
}

A <- read_csv("../Data/A_135.CSV",
              locale = locale(encoding = "Big5"),
              show_col_types = FALSE
)

B <- read_csv("../Data/B_135.csv",
              locale = locale(encoding = "Big5"),
              show_col_types = FALSE
)

A <- A %>%
  mutate(Group = "A")
B <- B %>%
  mutate(Group = "B")

data_all <- bind_rows(A,B)

purchase_items <- c("Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5")

missing_cols <- setdiff(purchase_items, names(data_all))

data_all <- data_all %>%
  mutate(
    across(all_of(purchase_items), as.numeric),
    Purchase_intention = rowMeans(across(all_of(purchase_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("A", "B"))
  )

alpha_result <- psych ::alpha(data_all[,purchase_items])

print(alpha_result)

median_summary <- data_all %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    median = median(Purchase_intention, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(Purchase_intention, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(Purchase_intention, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(Purchase_intention, na.rm = TRUE),
    .Group = "drop"
  )

print(median_summary)

wilcox_result <- wilcox.test(
  Purchase_intention ~ Group,
  data = data_all,
  alternative = "two.side",
  exact = FALSE
)

print(wilcox_result)

```
